title: PARA Workspace Architecture & Governance Standards (v1.8.x)
summary: Foundational architecture, governance, and efficiency standards for PARA Workspace v1.8.x. Covers: four-pillar structure (.para/, .agents/), Governing Kernel v1.5.3 (11 Invariants, 10 Heuristics incl. H10 KI), project.md schema v1.6.3 with field-gated I/O and @ecosystem/ path resolution, Ecosystem + Meta-Project types (v1.7.6), two-level Agent Index (workspace + project rules/skills with proactive trigger), Skills system v1.6.4 with /para-skill Co-Author workflow (v1.7.6) and Sidecar Skill pattern (v1.7.6.3), CLI with Smart Archive and catalog.yml governance, SYNC.md cross-project notifications, Knowledge System with platform-injected KI context (v1.7.0+), System KI governed lifecycle with template sync (v1.7.1), KR7 Ephemeral Reference Ban (v1.7.5), i18n docs/locales/ architecture (v1.7.6), orphan directory cleanup in installer (v1.7.6.3), Brainstorm Extract Paradigm with consent gate and 500-line threshold replacing Dual Output (v1.7.12), Brainstorm Sidecar Skill for just-in-time template loading (v1.7.12), VERSIONS.yml centralized version tracking replacing catalog version field (v1.7.13), preferences.date_format for content display dates (v1.7.13), anti-bulk-overwrite convention for governed library versions (v1.7.13), Cognitive Bypass Fix with Soft Dump payload in brainstorm/plan/docs (v1.7.9.1), Anti-Token-Decay Guardrails with HTML Locks, Staged Drill-down, and Git Auto-Run Shield (v1.7.13.2), Content Authoring Ecosystem with /write workflow and write sidecar skill for ebook/paper/tutorial/blog/social/email content types (v1.7.14), /logs session telemetry workflow with Fast Glance and Structured Audit modes (v1.7.14), BUG-32 fix for para-workflow add source metadata default (v1.7.14), Harness Skill with guard catalog (6 types) and auto-scan protocol for context-aware safety guards (v1.7.15), Plan Status Gate enforcing Draft-to-Active lifecycle for implementation plans (v1.7.15), roadmap prefix naming convention for OSSS compliance (v1.7.15), C7 Plan Status Gate sovereignty rule preventing Agent from mutating plan Status or active_plan without user confirmation (v1.7.16), /spec workflow and spec sidecar skill for specification-driven development (v1.7.16), Proactive Guard Scan for CHECKPOINT items in plan phases (v1.7.16), Dynamic Tool System with install-tool/remove-tool/list-tools CLI commands and tool registry (v1.8.0), Tool Registry (registry/tools.yml) for centralized plugin management (v1.8.0), auto-generated wrapper scripts with Dev/Prod fallback routing (v1.8.0), para-graph as first tool plugin PoC (v1.8.0), Tool Intelligence Installer with manifest-declared AI intelligence via agents: block in tool.manifest.yml (v1.8.1), install-tool --agents/--no-agents flags for selective intelligence installation (v1.8.1), remove-tool agents cleanup detecting and offering removal of bundled intelligence (v1.8.1), tool.schema.json extended with agents property for schema validation (v1.8.1), and token optimization patterns. Covers 27 core workflows, 12 rules, and 10 skills.
